base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of maze_wall_tile_atlas — a tile from 1980 pac man. Individual 8×8 wall-piece tiles used to compose the maze: straight-horizontal, straight-vertical, 4 corner types (NE/NW/SE/SW), T-junctions (4), cross-junction, dead-end caps (4), tunnel-entry/exit (2), ghost-pen-gate (pink bar), plus color variants (cyan/red/white) for end-of-level maze-flash animation. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Individual 8×8 wall-piece tiles used to compose the maze: straight-horizontal, straight-vertical, 4 corner types (NE/NW/SE/SW), T-junctions (4), cross-junction, dead-end caps (4), tunnel-entry/exit (2), ghost-pen-gate (pink bar), plus color variants (cyan/red/white) for end-of-level maze-flash animation
